title: NeuralSpikeSim
description: An interactive simulation of Hodgkin-Huxley neural models, allowing real-time adjustment of membrane conductance and current injection to visualize action potentials.

title: GeneExpr3D
description: A web-based 3D visualization dashboard designed to map spatial transcriptomics and coordinate genomic expression levels in embryonic tissues.

title: Zebrafish Complement Dashboard
description: An automated data processing pipeline and dashboard visualizing zebrafish complement system activations and macrophage responses post-injury.

title: Ascent Run Club Portal
description: The digital home of our local community runner collective, displaying schedules, route maps (gpx integrations), and upcoming social race events.

title: HRV & Sleep Correlation Engine
description: A personal project parsing raw FitBit and Garmin HRV metrics to analyze statistical dependencies between sleep cycles and aerobic recovery times.
